reviews.comment:
Igual que el resto de YPF lejos de zonas urbanas! Le pongo 5 estrellas porque parar en cada YPF era la mejor sensación del mundo luego de esta cuarentena inútil. Ojalá quien lea esto se le den Miles de viajes! Bendiciones

(Translated by Google)
Just like the rest of the YPF stations far from urban areas! I'm giving it 5 stars because stopping at each YPF was the best feeling in the world after this pointless quarantine. I hope whoever reads this gets thousands of trips! Blessings
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8700140572418264453/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5bU0yWHh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Una sola estrella no me dejaron quedarme a pasar la noche en el estacionamiento supuestamente o aparentemente  los dueños no dejan al menos eso me dijo el playero. Yo estaba en una combi con mis hijos y mí esposa.

(Translated by Google)
I was given a single star; they wouldn't let me stay overnight in the parking lot. Apparently, or at least that's what the attendant told me, the owners don't allow it. I was in a van with my wife and children.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8700140572418264453/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5NFB1SFdREAE
